case_title: EDWARD HARDY VS. ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARDY, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-27-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,650.00 FILED BY HARDY, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-27-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-08-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-27-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-27-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY STEVEN WEBER--INVESTIGATOR. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARDY, EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESURANCE PROPERTY AND CASUALTY INSURANCE COMPANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
